title: Mod Browser
description: This mod provides a simple-to-use ingame Interface for downloading mods from the modrinth library
body:
# Info
ModBrowser is an in-game browser to easily discover and install mods from the Modrinth library. The browser is started by clicking the ModBrowser button in the main menu. The main page already lists the most popular mods. By using the built-in search function, you can find your favorite mods just by entering some keywords.

## Features (newest Version)
- Install all your mods with a convenient ingame interface
- Full support for Mods (restart required after change) and Resource/Shader Packs (works immediately!)

## Older Version
Please note that versions prior to 3.0.0 (1.18.2 and below) use the curseforge library and may be broken
